posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Happening today: community new features webinar
Sign up here to join live and hear about this month’s latest updates including:

  • New dependencies capabilities
  • Dashboard improvements
  • Ability to create workdocs in the Docs Column
  • A roundup of the latest mobile improvements for Android

posts.author: Danish (Klaus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Where can we find the recording? It said that if we registered but were unable to attend, it would be possible to have the recording sent

Thanks!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Klaus,

Yes! You can expect to see the recording early next week. If you still do not receive it by next week let me know!

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: Will the recording be avaliable for people who didnt register

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rick,

sorry for the delay in response. I was away for a little. Yes the monthly new feature webinars are update usually around a week after they occur. Here is the new feature from January. You can also check out our community newsletter as well.
